    Package Description
    de.uka.ilkd.key.core  
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui
    This package contains classes forming the graphical user interface of KeY.

  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.gui used by de.uka.ilkd.key.core 
    Class and Description
    GUIListener
    GUIListener defines the interface for an object that listens to actions of gui components, e.g.
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.gui used by de.uka.ilkd.key.gui 
    Class and Description
    ApplyTacletDialog 
    AuxiliaryContractSelectionPanel
    This panel used to select which T(s) to use for a AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.
    DependencyContractCompletion.TermStringWrapper 
    ExampleChooser.Example
    This class wraps a File and has a special ExampleChooser.Example.toString() method only using the short file name w/o path.
    InfoTreeNode
    Every node of InfoTree is an instance of this class.
    InteractiveRuleApplicationCompletion
    Instances of class implementing this interface are able to complete rule applications.
    InvariantConfigurator
    This class creates a dialog to input a user-defined invariant, variant and modifies formula for a selected loop.
    KeYFileChooser
    Extends the usual Swing file chooser by a bookmark panel and predefined filters.
    MainWindow 
    NodeInfoVisualizer
    A UI component showing additional information about a Node in the current Proof.
    NodeInfoVisualizerListener
    A listener to the NodeInfoVisualizer class.
    RecentFileMenu
    This class offers a mechanism to manage recent files; it adds the necessary menu items to a menu or even can provide that menu itself.
    RecentFileMenu.RecentFileEntry 
    TacletMatchCompletionDialog 
    TaskTree 
    WindowUserInterfaceControl
    Implementation of UserInterfaceControl which controls the MainWindow with the typical user interface of KeY.
